This type of story made me think of my experience with parasocial relationship then and now.
While I'm at it, I feel like sharing mine. Quick sidenote, the experience is different from 2018 to now.
I mean, if you're interested to hear it. But don't worry, all is good.

So this whole parasocial relationship began with me having an imaginary friend, just to pass time, of course. I might not be the only one who had this type of experience.
Anyone here? Or just me?? Hmmmm
Before 2018, I had an imaginary friend, which I took inspiration from "Senpai" from Yandere Simulator.
I remember I used to ask, "You good?" And Senpai's answer is always, "Yes." lool
It was obviously one-sided, but it made me feel my imagination began to improve at that time.
